To: debian-mentors@lists.debian.org
Subject: RFS: tinyserve/0.3.1-1 [ITP] -- minimal multi-worker HTTP server built on libuv

Dear mentors,

I am looking for a sponsor for my package "tinyserve":

 * Package name     : tinyserve
   Version          : 0.3.1-1
   Upstream contact : Derrity <derrity0731@proton.me>
 * URL              : https://github.com/Derrity/TinyServe
 * License          : MIT (Expat)
   Section          : web

The source builds the binary package:

  tinyserve - minimal multi-worker HTTP server built on libuv

To access further information about this package, please visit
the following URL:

  https://mentors.debian.net/package/tinyserve/

Alternatively, you can download the package with dget using this command:

  dget -x https://mentors.debian.net/debian/pool/main/t/tinyserve/tinyserve_0.3.1-1.dsc

Salsa: https://salsa.debian.org/Derrity/tinyserve

Changes since the last upload (this is the first upload):

 tinyserve (0.3.1-1) unstable; urgency=medium

   * Initial release. (Closes: #1134907)

QA status:
 * lintian -EvIL +pedantic --pedantic on .changes: clean
   (only the expected initial-upload-closes-no-bugs is shown).
 * piuparts -d unstable: clean install / upgrade / purge.
 * autopkgtest -- null: smoke test passes.
 * sbuild -d unstable: rebuilds cleanly in a fresh sid chroot.
 * blhc: all hardening flags active.
 * Reproducible build: yes (tested with reprotest --vary=+all).

Best regards,
Derrity
